title: Sacrifice & Breakthrough
description: Learn when to sacrifice material to open the enemy position

steps.title: The Sacrifice
steps.instruction: Sacrifice your Officer to break through the defense.
steps.explanation: Sometimes giving up a strong piece opens lines for a decisive attack.
steps.hint: Move the Officer into the line that opens the defense.
steps.mistakeFeedback: Choose the move that creates the breakthrough, not a random advance.
steps.teaching_moment: A well-timed sacrifice can shatter opponent coordination inside the Conflict Zone.
steps.learningObjective: Recognize when material is less important than initiative and king safety.

steps.title: The Breakthrough
steps.instruction: Follow up the sacrifice with a decisive capture.
steps.explanation: After the sacrifice, remaining pieces can flood the zone.
steps.hint: Follow the sacrifice by advancing the Warrior into the opened line.
steps.mistakeFeedback: Pick the breakthrough move that continues the attack.
steps.strategic_context: The goal is not to win material, but to reach 10 captures or checkmate.
